input: I was charged twice for order A1029. Please refund the duplicate charge.
final_response: I've confirmed a duplicate charge on order A1029. A refund of $120.00 is above the limit I can issue directly, so I've submitted it for human approval and a specialist will finalize it. (see refunds.md: Refund window)

policy_citations.snippet: Refunds are available within 30 days of delivery. Orders outside the 30-day window are not eligible for a monetary refund, but the customer may be offered an alternative such as store credit or a discount on a future order.
